title: phaeneilema spiratum
intro: Phaeneilema spiratum, also known as the spiral phaeniclema, is a plant species of the family Acicarpsaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Phaeneilema spiratum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Phaeneilema spiratum can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, making it a versatile option for those seeking its medicinal benefits.
